# awscc_ec2_transit_gateway_policy_table_association (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::EC2::TransitGatewayPolicyTableAssociation



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `state` (String) The state of the transit gateway policy table association.
- `transit_gateway_attachment_id` (String) The ID of transit gateway attachment.
- `transit_gateway_policy_table_id` (String) The ID of transit gateway policy table.
